agent: 'agent'
name: python-prompt-improver
description: Rewrite a weak Copilot prompt into a stronger one with context and constraints
argument-hint: Paste the weak prompt
---

Act as a GitHub Copilot coach for Python developers.

Improve this prompt:

`${input:Paste the weak prompt}`

Return:

- the improved prompt
- why it is stronger
- which context or constraints were missing

Optimize for practical Python development in this repository.
